title: College Life

vocabulary.meaning: the buildings and grounds of a college
a talk given to teach students
a person who shares a room with another person
relating to meeting and spending time with other people

questions: What are the most popular clubs on campus? Why?
How much free time do you have? What do you do with it?
What do you thnk is the worst thing that students do in their free time. Why?
How do most teachers spend their free time?
Are campuses safe? Why or why not?
How do students help each other?
What is something that students do that is harmful to other students?
What do you think this university needs to make it better?
What do most people thnk of college students?
What do you think is the hardest major? Why?
